notes: HP split into HP Inc. (PCs/printers) and Hewlett Packard Enterprise in 2015. HP merged with Compaq in 2002.
HP acquired Convex in 1995; V-Class HyperPlane crossbar backplane derived from Convex supercomputing technology.
Primary competitor to HP V-Class; Ultra Enterprise 6000/10000 cited as main OLTP/DSS rivals.
RS/6000 SP cited as competitive MPP option; IBM mainframe Parallel Sysplex compared to EPS40.
AlphaServer TruCluster cited; DEC strategy described as NT-focused which hampered UNIX sales.
HP V-Class supported StorageTek mainframe-level peripheral devices for migration use cases.
V-Class supported EMC storage peripherals for enterprise-scale deployments.
